name: Rocket Lab USA, Inc.
tagline: End-to-End Space Company — 从小型火箭到全栈太空服务的垂直整合先锋

summaries.title: I. 收入结构
summaries.content:
Space Systems $305M (+99%) — 卫星组件、航天器制造、星座解决方案
Launch Services $131M (+47%) — Electron 火箭发射 · 行业第二高频率
总收入 $436M (+81%) — 双引擎增长 · Space Systems 占比从 64% 升至 70%

summaries.title: II. Electron 火箭
summaries.content:
累计56次发射 · 仅次于SpaceX的最高频率私人火箭
碳复合材料箭体 · 3D打印 Rutherford 引擎
成本效率领先 · 单次发射价格 $7.5M
复用计划推进中 · 第一级海上回收已验证

summaries.title: III. Neutron 中型火箭
summaries.content:
8吨LEO运力 · 填补中型火箭市场空白
2026 H2 首飞目标 · Archimedes 引擎已进入热火测试
可复用设计 · 整流罩「Hungry Hippo」机构
目标客户：星座部署 + 国防任务 + 载人预研

summaries.title: IV. Space Systems 业务
summaries.content:
从「发射公司」到「全栈太空公司」的关键转型
卫星组件：太阳能电池板、反应轮、分离系统 — 对外+自用
SolAero (太阳能) + Sinclair (姿态控制) + PSC (分离系统) 收购整合
为GlobalStar/MDA/Synspective等建造完整航天器

summaries.title: V. 竞争优势
summaries.content:
① 垂直整合：从引擎到卫星到发射的全链条控制
② 飞行遗产：56次发射的可靠性记录
③ 产能规模：全球唯一能批量制造碳复合材料箭体的私企
④ 国防关系：NSSL Lane 2认证 + SDA合同

summaries.title: VI. 风险因素
summaries.content:
① Neutron 首飞延迟风险 — 新火箭开发不确定性
② 仍在亏损 — FY2025 Adj EBITDA -$57M
③ SpaceX 竞争压力 — Starship 成功将改变行业格局
④ 政府合同依赖 — 美国国防预算波动
⑤ 太空保险和发射失败风险

quotes.speaker: Peter Beck
quotes.text: Rocket Lab is the only company besides SpaceX that has successfully built and operated a reliable orbital launch vehicle. We are now building Neutron to go after the medium-lift market — a $10 billion annual opportunity that currently has no real competition.
quotes.textCn: 除SpaceX外，Rocket Lab是唯一成功建造并运营可靠轨道运载火箭的公司。我们现在正在建造Neutron来进军中型运力市场——这是一个年规模100亿美元、目前没有真正竞争对手的机会。

quotes.speaker: Peter Beck
quotes.text: We are not just a launch company anymore. Space Systems is growing twice as fast as Launch and represents 70% of revenue. We build everything from solar panels to star trackers to complete spacecraft. That vertical integration is our moat.
quotes.textCn: 我们不再只是一家发射公司。航天系统业务增速是发射的两倍，占收入70%。从太阳能板到星敏感器到完整航天器，我们全部自主制造。这种垂直整合就是我们的护城河。

quotes.speaker: Adam Spice
quotes.text: We exited the year with a $1.1 billion backlog, up 80% year-over-year. The pipeline continues to strengthen across both segments, and we see a clear path to profitability as Neutron scales.
quotes.textCn: 我们以11亿美元的在手订单结束了这一年，同比增长80%。两个业务板块的管线持续增强，随着Neutron规模化，我们看到了清晰的盈利路径。

docs.title: Annual Report on Form 10-K · FY2025

docs.title: Q4 2025 Earnings Call Transcript
docs.meta: CEO Peter Beck · CFO Adam Spice

transcriptPreview.speaker: Peter Beck
transcriptPreview.text: 2025 was a transformative year for Rocket Lab. We grew revenue 81%, expanded our backlog to over a billion dollars, and made significant progress on Neutron. We are building the most vertically integrated space company in the world.
transcriptPreview.textCn: 2025年是Rocket Lab变革性的一年。收入增长81%，在手订单扩大到超过10亿美元，Neutron取得重大进展。我们正在建设世界上垂直整合度最高的太空公司。

transcriptPreview.speaker: Adam Spice
transcriptPreview.text: Q4 revenue was $132 million, up 93% year-over-year. Space Systems grew 99% for the full year. Gross margins expanded over 500 basis points as we gained operating leverage.
transcriptPreview.textCn: Q4收入1.32亿美元，同比增长93%。航天系统全年增长99%。随着运营杠杆释放，毛利率扩大了500多个基点。
